title: Water Crews Working to Repair Water Main Break on Sunnycrest Road
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Water is repairing a water main break on the 100 block of Sunnycrest Road, causing service disruptions for households and businesses in the area and low pressure in Eastwood. Sunnycrest Road between Shotwell Park and Hickok Avenue is closed to vehicle traffic; sidewalks remain open with detours in place.
processing_notes: Sharon F. Owens appears in navigation as Mayor but is not mentioned in article content
No dollar amounts or timeline for repair completion provided
Contact number provided (315-448-8360) for public inquiries
Geographic scope: Sunnycrest Road, Shotwell Park, Hickok Avenue, Eastwood neighborhood
